name: SA Sample - Smart Field Fill
brief: Sample: free-text to structured fields on a Business Central Sales Line using AI.
description: Adds an Auto-Fill action on Sales Lines that takes the user's free-text Description, asks a Smart Agent to interpret it, and writes the suggested Item No. and Quantity back to the line. A practical pattern for AI-assisted data entry in D365 BC — the same idea Microsoft Copilot uses for sales line descriptions, but powered by your own Smart Agent and extensible to any record.
